Module lifeline
Package model.accident

Class Patient

java.lang.Object
model.accident.Patient
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Patient extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a patient involved in a medical accident displayed when clicking on an accident node.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Patient()
    Creates a patient with default medical values.
    Patient(String name, int age, int bpm, double bodyTemperature, boolean conscious, String condition)
    Creates a patient with custom medical values.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    getAge()
    Returns the patient's age used to describe the emergency situation.

    Returns the patient's body temperature.

    Returns the patient's heart rate.

    Returns the patient's medical condition displayed in the interface.

    Return the patient's name used in the accident information panel.

    Indicates whether the patient is conscious.

    Sets the patient's age.
    void

    Updates the patient's body temperature while keeping it in a realistic range.

    Updates the patient's heart rate while keeping it in a realistic range.
    void
    setCondition(String condition)
    Sets the patient's medical condition.
    void

    Updates the patient's consciousness state.

  • Constructor Details

    • Patient

      public Patient()
      Creates a patient with default medical values.

    • Patient

      public Patient(String name, int age, int bpm, double bodyTemperature, boolean conscious, String condition)
      Creates a patient with custom medical values.
      Parameters:
      name - patient name
      age - patient age
      bpm - heart rate (beats per minute)
      bodyTemperature - body temperature (Celsius)
      conscious - true if the patient is conscious
      condition - short medical condition description

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Return the patient's name used in the accident information panel.
      Returns:
      patient name, or null if no name is defined

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the patient's name.
      Parameters:
      name - new patient name

    • getAge

      public int getAge()
      Returns the patient's age used to describe the emergency situation.
      Returns:
      patient age, or -1 if unknown

    • setAge

      public void setAge(int age)
      Sets the patient's age.
      Parameters:
      age - new patient age

    • getBpm

      public int getBpm()
      Returns the patient's heart rate.
      Returns:
      heart rate in beats per minute

    • setBpm

      public void setBpm(int bpm)
      Updates the patient's heart rate while keeping it in a realistic range.
      Parameters:
      bpm - new heart rate

    • getBodyTemperature

      public double getBodyTemperature()
      Returns the patient's body temperature.
      Returns:
      body temperature

    • setBodyTemperature

      public void setBodyTemperature(double bodyTemperature)
      Updates the patient's body temperature while keeping it in a realistic range.
      Parameters:
      bodyTemperature - new body temperature

    • isConscious

      public boolean isConscious()
      Indicates whether the patient is conscious.
      Returns:
      true if the patient is conscious

    • setConscious

      public void setConscious(boolean conscious)
      Updates the patient's consciousness state.
      Parameters:
      conscious - true if the patient is conscious

    • getCondition

      public String getCondition()
      Returns the patient's medical condition displayed in the interface.
      Returns:
      patient condition

    • setCondition

      public void setCondition(String condition)
      Sets the patient's medical condition.
      Parameters:
      condition - new patient condition
